summary: Project involves a work/field management app with punch in/out tracking and project information forms. User is removing Date, Weather Condition, and Temperature fields from Project Information, and removing Punch In/Punch Out fields for Lead Technician and Assistant Technician.
architectural_notes: Date, Weather Condition, and Temperature fields removed from Project Information section
Punch In and Punch Out fields removed for Lead Technician and Assistant Technician

existing_features.title: Remove the Date, Weather Condition, and Temperature fields from the Project Information section of the ReportForm component. These fields should no longer be rendered, editable, or included in form state.

Remove the Punch In and Punch Out fields for the Lead Technician and Assistant Technician from the Punch section of the ReportForm component. These fields should no longer be rendered, editable, saved to state, or included in localStorage persistence.
